name: Irem
description: Japanese developer known for R-Type, Moon Patrol, Kung-Fu Master, GunForce, In the Hunt, and other arcade and console games.

eras.title: Arcade Action Era
eras.description: Irem establishes itself through arcade action, shooters, and run-and-gun games.

eras.title: Legacy and Reissue Era
eras.description: The company continues mainly through later releases, licensing, and preservation of its arcade catalog.
